/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/FileMove.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/FileMove.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileMove.dir/src/cli_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileMove.dir/src/storage_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileMove.dir/src/move_worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileMove.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileMove.dir/src/settings_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileMove.dir/src/status_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileMove.dir/src/about_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileMove.dir/src/group_dialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileMove.dir/src/search_dialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileMove.dir/src/shutdown_dialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileMove.dir/src/logger.cpp.o -o FileMove
